ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player (e.g., right-hand, left-hand) */,
  "bowling_skill" TEXT /* Bowling skill of the player (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm spin) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  "player_biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Name of the team's home ground */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team’s official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Team 1 won, Team 2 won, Tie) */,
  "man_of_the_match" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was the man of the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "toss_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., bat, field) */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Current status of the match (e.g., completed, abandoned, ongoing) */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  "third_umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third umpire (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_man_of_the_match FOREIGN KEY ("man_of_the_match") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_toss_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("toss_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistics are for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics are for */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player */,
  "overs_bowled" INTEGER /* Number of overs bowled by the player */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Number of catches taken by the player */,
  "stumpings" INTEGER /* Number of stumpings taken by the player */,
  "fielding_position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the field */,
  "dismissal_type" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., caught, bowled, run out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started working with the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach stopped working with the team (if applicable) */,
  "coach_profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's profile picture */,
  "coach_biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the coach */,
  "coach_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "man_of_the_match" (
  "motm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each man of the match entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the man of the match is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was the man of the match */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for being awarded man of the match */,
  "motm_award_date" TEXT /* Date the man of the match award was given */,
  "motm_award_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who awarded the man of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_man_of_the_match_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_man_of_the_match_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "role_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the role */,
  "role_icon" TEXT /* Icon associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
